offer: For accounting firms processing 10–50 payrolls/month, payroll discrepancies cause late payments to employees. We provide anomaly detection instead of manual audits and checks.
problem: Identifying payroll discrepancies in hours and deductions.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers posts about payroll workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for accounting tools discussion
try_it: Let users try manual entry and anomaly notifications on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing payroll data
